subcodes.first_line: O respected daughter of that noble soul! Thy letter was received. Praise be to God, thou hast succeeded in visiting the resting-place of thy father, and likewise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر محترم آن برکوار نامه شما رسید الحمد لله بزیارت مرقد پدر موفقی و همچنین
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @eulogies; reminiscences
